'''hanguwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:meander|meander]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meander|meander]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hanguwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængiwith|hængiwith]] || [[word:hængiwij|hængiwij]] || [[word:hængiwish|hængiwish]] || [[word:hængiwi|hængiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangunguwuth|hangunguwuth]] || [[word:hangunguwuj|hangunguwuj]] || [[word:hangunguwush|hangunguwush]] || [[word:hangunguwu|hangunguwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanguwuth|hanguwuth]] || [[word:hanguwuj|hanguwuj]] || [[word:hanguwush|hanguwush]] || [[word:hanguwu|hanguwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangufwuth|hangufwuth]] || [[word:hangufwuj|hangufwuj]] || [[word:hangufwush|hangufwush]] || [[word:hangufwuf|hangufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanguwuthu|hanguwuthu]] || [[word:hanguwuju|hanguwuju]] || [[word:hanguwushu|hanguwushu]] || [[word:hanguwuku|hanguwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanguwuth|hanguwuth]] || [[word:hanguwuj|hanguwuj]] || [[word:hanguwush|hanguwush]] || [[word:hanguwu|hanguwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanguwuthul|hanguwuthul]] || [[word:hanguwujul|hanguwujul]] || [[word:hanguwushul|hanguwushul]] || [[word:hanguwukul|hanguwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanguwuthuthu|hanguwuthuthu]] || [[word:hanguwujuju|hanguwujuju]] || [[word:hanguwushushu|hanguwushushu]] || [[word:hanguwuku|hanguwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanguwuthun|hanguwuthun]] || [[word:hanguwujun|hanguwujun]] || [[word:hanguwushun|hanguwushun]] || [[word:hanguwukun|hanguwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanguwuthuoro|hanguwuthuoro]] || [[word:hanguwujuoro|hanguwujuoro]] || [[word:hanguwushuoro|hanguwushuoro]] || [[word:hanguwukuoro|hanguwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
